items.claim: McMillan is overconfident in his own skill level.
items.quote: I think McMillan thinks he's a lot better than he is.

items.claim: McMillan's stand-up ability will allow him to force a war and finish Montes.
items.quote: I think the fight's going to stay standing and we're going to see Tommy McMillan force Montes into a war and eventually finish him.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has been consistently out-wrestled in his recent fights.
items.quote: Ramirez has just been wrestle [ __ ] many times.

items.claim: Chase Hooper's chin is suspect due to recent knockout losses.
items.quote: The chin of Hooper might be, you know, sus.

items.claim: Chase Hooper lacks athleticism and striking ability on the feet.
items.quote: I will say Hooper striking is very bad. He always he's got no athleticism on the feet whatsoever.

items.claim: Chase Hooper has a higher level of competition experience than Mitch Ramirez.
items.quote: Chase Hooper has simply beat way better guys than Mitch Ramirez.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan has lost to lower-tier opponents like Gregory Rodriguez and Armen Petrosyan.
items.quote: we've seen Leroy lose to Lesser men. Listen, Leroyy's lost to to Greg Rodriguez who can easily got out of there and he also lost to Arman Petrosian.
